---
title: "Ordinary Differential Equations: Theory, Analysis, and Computation"
subtitle: "CORE-007 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "ODEs are the language of dynamics. This course covers existence theory, qualitative analysis, stability, and numerical methods — preparing the student for every dynamical model in the curriculum."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Ordinary Differential Equations: Theory, Analysis, and Computation

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
